EYEWEAR FOLLOW US ON INSTAGRAM Trussardi Men and Women: The Style of the Gentle Society Discover the Trussardi collection of men's clothing and women's clothing , along with leather accessories . From essential pieces like t-shirts, shirts, and trousers to jackets, leather bags , and small leather goods, each product combines contemporary design, quality materials, and Italian style. Through its collections, Trussardi expresses an idea of authentic and contemporary elegance, inspired by the Gentle Society : a way of life based on balance, attention to detail, and the pursuit of beauty .
